email_text:
From: john.doe@techcorp.com
Subject: Urgent - Payment Issue

Hi support team,

I've been trying to process a refund for order #ORD-12345 but keep getting an error. This is blocking our Q4 close and needs immediate attention.

My customer ID is CUST-98765. Please escalate to your manager.

Thanks,
John Doe
VP Engineering, TechCorp

From: sarah.johnson@startup.io
Subject: Billing Question

Hello,

I notice my invoice #INV-54321 has a charge for 100 API calls but I only made 75. Can you check this?

Customer ID: CUST-11111

Best,
Sarah

From: alex.martinez@company.com
Subject: API Not Working

Your API keeps returning 500 errors. This is affecting our production system.

We're a paying customer (account #ACC-77777) and need this resolved ASAP.

Alex Martinez

From: emily.chen@bigco.com
Subject: Re: Order ORD-99999

Hi,

I'm following up on my previous email about order ORD-99999. I still haven't received my refund.

Can someone from management please contact me?

Emily Chen
CEO
Customer #CUST-22222
emily.chen@bigco.com

From: support-request@automated.com
Subject: Automated Report

This is an automated message from our monitoring system.

Multiple API failures detected in the last hour affecting production workloads.

Please investigate immediately.
